name: Classic White Sneakers
description: Minimalist white leather sneakers with cushioned sole, perfect for casual everyday wear.

description: Washed blue denim jacket with button-up front and chest pockets. A timeless wardrobe staple.

description: Compact genuine leather crossbody bag with adjustable strap and gold hardware accents.

description: Lightweight floral print midi dress with flutter sleeves, ideal for warm weather outings.

description: Tailored wool blend overcoat in camel tone with a double-breasted front and belt.

description: Stretch cotton slim fit chinos available in khaki. Comfortable and versatile for office or weekend.

name: Running Sports Watch
description: Lightweight digital sports watch with heart rate monitor, GPS tracking, and 5ATM water resistance.
